---
title: "nitrix.signal"
generated: true
signature-hash: 11685e389989d588
description: "nitrix.signal -- 1D signal-processing primitives."
listing:
  id: nitrix-signal-symbols
  contents: "nitrix-signal/*.qmd"
  type: table
  fields: [title, description]
  sort: "title"
  filter-ui: false
  page-size: 500
---

::: {.callout-important title="Generated reference stub — fill me"}
Auto-generated scaffold for `nitrix.signal`. Fill the prose *outside* the
generated markers; do **not** ship as-is (SPEC §6.5). `check_reference_staleness.py` flags signature drift.
:::

<!-- nitrix:gen overview:__module__ -->
nitrix.signal -- 1D signal-processing primitives.

Submodules:

- `window`     -- windowed-sample extraction utilities.
- `filter`     -- linear filtering: polynomial detrend;
  zero-phase frequency-domain band-pass / band-stop / low- /
  high-pass ([`bandpass`](nitrix-signal-filter/bandpass.qmd) / [`bandstop`](nitrix-signal-filter/bandstop.qmd) / [`lowpass`](nitrix-signal-filter/lowpass.qmd) /
  [`highpass`](nitrix-signal-filter/highpass.qmd)); and recursive Butterworth IIR ([`iir_filter`](nitrix-signal-filter/iir_filter.qmd) /
  [`butterworth_sos`](nitrix-signal-filter/butterworth_sos.qmd) / [`sosfilt`](nitrix-signal-filter/sosfilt.qmd) / [`sosfiltfilt`](nitrix-signal-filter/sosfiltfilt.qmd)).
- `fourier`    -- spectral utilities: product-filter,
  analytic-signal / Hilbert transform, instantaneous frequency /
  phase, envelope.
- `tsconv`     -- time-series convolution (1D conv with
  channel and batch handling matching the fMRI use case).
- `interpolate` -- 1D / N-D interpolation utilities.

This subpackage replaces `nitrix.functional.window` plus the
`hypercoil.functional.{tsconv,interpolate}` ports.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

## Symbols

::: {#nitrix-signal-symbols}
:::
